description: Style Note boss perfumes from the house of hugo boss makes you feel confident and fresh even at the end of a particularly trying day. Creating an impressive impression any time of the day, these intense fragrances are meant to be worn. Product Details boss Pure is a spray perfume for men that comes in an innovative glass flask which has a metallic cover on one half Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 50 ml
